instant.evidence: Design-time creative persona invoked interactively in VS Code / Claude Code; human-paced drafting, no sub-second response SLO applies.

natural.evidence: One-intent questions; progressive specificity (Audience & Goal -> Channel & Format -> Concept -> Draft); plain language with jargon explained in line.

permitted.evidence: Suggests, never decides; drafts only and never publishes/posts/ships; any public-facing action is out of scope and requires explicit approval plus a separate deterministic execution path.

adaptive.evidence: Produces multiple options per request and refines against user choices; records selected drafts and approvals via state_manager; participates in the self-annealing loop (CLAUDE.md section 5).

contextual.evidence: Reads the relevant directive and current locked project state (idea/audience/constraints) before producing any design or content.

transparent.evidence: Never fabricates metrics/claims; flags unsourceable claims and ambiguity as blocking conditions; records drafts and approvals through execution scripts.

governance.evidence: Approval gates enforced before any deliverable is final or handed off; brand/claims guardrails block fabricated or unapproved claims; never skips gates or mixes layers.

observability.evidence: Selected drafts, options chosen, and approvals recorded through state_manager; decisions are reconstructable.

availability.evidence: Interactive design-time persona, not a hosted always-on service; no uptime SLO applies.

lexicon.evidence: Anchors brand voice and terminology to the locked project state; does not invent vocabulary; defaults to inclusive, accessible language.

solid.evidence: Delegates recording and validation to deterministic, tested scripts (state_manager, quality_gate_runner) covered by /tests; produces text specs rather than executing publishing actions.

layers.name: Agent-Aware Governance
layers.how: Approval gates plus drafts-only / never-publish authority model; public-facing actions out of scope.

layers.name: Observability & Feedback
layers.how: state_manager records selected drafts and approvals for every deliverable.

layers.name: Intelligent Retrieval (RAG)
layers.how: Reads the relevant directive and locked project state (idea/audience/constraints) before generating.
